name: portainerctl
description: Portainer's official CLI for driving Portainer Business Edition over its REST API (environments, stacks, GitOps, containers, Kubernetes, edge, users/teams/RBAC)
notes: portainerctl is a single GitHub repo (portainer/portainerctl, default branch 'develop') with no docs site, so the only synced source is the raw upstream README.md. The topical docs/ files (installation, configuration, environments, stacks, docker-resources, kubernetes, edge, users-teams-rbac, administration) are hand-curated from the README command reference and the cmd/*.go command definitions; refresh them manually when the README changes.
